strengths: Deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience across multiple production environments directly matching the required stack
AI/LLM integration and MCP framework work at re:cinq directly satisfies the nice-to-have LLM API experience
AWS (CDK, services) and Kubernetes background covers the infrastructure nice-to-haves rarely seen at this level
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a Junior/Mid role creates misalignment on expectations, compensation, and growth trajectory
No explicit PostgreSQL or relational database depth visible in recent roles; MongoDB dominates recent history and SQL is listed only generically in skills
No mention of Nest.js, which is a listed preferred technology for the role
response.justification: Bogdan's technical profile is a strong match for the stack — TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, and Kubernetes are all present and battle-tested — and his recent AI/agent infrastructure work is a genuine differentiator. However, the role is scoped as Junior/Mid and he has operated at Staff level for over a decade; this seniority gap is the dominant concern, as it raises the likelihood of disengagement, rapid departure, or misaligned expectations around autonomy and impact that the role cannot accommodate.
